mapper.update:
update topic set articles_count = articles_count + 1 where id in
#{topicIdToUpdate}

update topic set articles_count = GREATEST(articles_count - 1, 0) where id in
#{topicId}
mapper.insert:
insert ignore into topic (name, slug) values
(#{topicToProcess.name}, #{topicToProcess.slug})
mapper.select: select id, name, slug, description, articles_count, create_time, update_time, status from topic where slug like concat(#{slug}, '%') order by (IF(slug = #{slug}, 1, 0)) desc, articles_count desc limit 6
